name: IndianOil Axis Bank Premium Credit Card
exclusions: fuel transaction charge outside applicable waiver terms
online skill-based gaming above fee threshold
transactions excluded under IndianOil Axis Bank Premium Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on spends of Rs 30,000 and above in a card anniversary year
additionalBenefits: 500 EDGE Miles on first spend within 30 days of card issuance
6 EDGE Miles per Rs 150 at IndianOil fuel outlets up to Rs 15,000 per month
1 EDGE Mile per Rs 150 on IndianOil fuel spends above Rs 15,000 per month
2 EDGE Miles per Rs 150 on grocery and supermarket spends up to Rs 5,000 per month
1 EDGE Mile per Rs 150 on grocery and supermarket spends above Rs 5,000 per month and other eligible spends
Unlimited 1% fuel surcharge waiver on purchases at IndianOil outlets, GST on surcharge is non-refundable
30% off on Zomato food delivery, capped at Rs 150 per order and valid twice per month
Complimentary domestic lounge access, illustrated by Axis as 2 visits per quarter in the value chart
Axis Dining Delights offers may apply as per programme terms

salaried: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India
